detaileddescription.para: Session invites stored in this interface
Current session search handle that we are using for matchmaking.

#NOTE (Maxwell): Since we only track one handle at a time, we don't support matchmaking for two different session names at the same time. This might be something useful down the line, think about if this is possible to support.
Session settings that we will create the matchmaking session result with.
Global string for the environment variable to get session ID for a spawned server.
Parent subsystem of this interface instance
Critical section to lock sessions map while accessing
Sessions stored in this interface, associated by session name
Flag denoting whether there is already a task in progress to get a session associated with a server
Array of session names that have an update queued from the backend
Array of delegates that are awaiting server session retrieval before executing
Pointer to SessionSearch. will be set when matchmaking is in progress
Default session setting to use when no CustomSessionSetting is provided

Session setting provided by user when matchmaking, if provided, CustomSessionSetting will be prioritized then DefaultSessionSetting. These will be cleared when matchmaking is complete and session search result is constructed
Cache matchmaking ticket after started matchmaking. to be used to cancel matchmaking process
Stored override for a local server name to register with.
Stored override for a local server IP to register with.
Stored override for a local server port to register with.
Attributes for a player using this session interface instance, contains crossplay and platform information
Array of ticket IDs that we have explicitly canceled, used to prevent race condition between cancel and start notification
Time that we last added a ticket ID to the list of canceled IDs
Time in seconds that we clear the array of canceled ticket IDs (default to five minutes)

It decides whether the GameServer is automatically register itself or should be done manually. Value depends to the configuration in the DefaultEngine.ini Section: [OnlineSubsystemAccelByte] Key: bManualRegisterServer (boolean) Effect TRUE: Developer is required to manually call the SendServerReady() after perform RegisterServer() Effect FALSE: Automatically handled & there is no need to call SendServerReady() after perform the RegisterServer() Default behavior: if not specified then FALSE
Prevent a dangling dedicated server that forgot to flag the server ready (Call SendServerReady() function)

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 HostingPlayerNum, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings) override
memberdef.name: CreateSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &HostingPlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings) override
memberdef.name: CreateSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &LocalPlayers, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings, TSharedRef< FOnlineSessionSearch > &SearchSettings) override
memberdef.name: StartMatchmaking

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FSessionMatchmakingUser > &LocalPlayers, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings, TSharedRef< FOnlineSessionSearch > &SearchSettings, const FOnStartMatchmakingComplete &CompletionDelegate) override
memberdef.name: StartMatchmaking

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &SearchingUserId, const FUniqueNetId &SessionId, const FUniqueNetId &FriendId, const FOnSingleSessionResultCompleteDelegate &CompletionDelegate) override
memberdef.name: FindSessionById

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &DesiredSession) override
memberdef.name: JoinSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &DesiredSession) override
memberdef.name: JoinSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &FriendList) override
memberdef.name: FindFriendSession

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &Friend) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriend

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &Friend) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriend

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Friends) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriends

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Friends) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriends

memberdef.argsstring: (const class FOnlineSessionSearchResult &SearchResult, FName PortType, FString &ConnectInfo) override
memberdef.name: GetResolvedConnectString

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, bool bWasInvited) override
memberdef.name: RegisterPlayer

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Players, bool bWasInvited=false) override
memberdef.name: RegisterPlayers

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Players) override
memberdef.name: UnregisterPlayers

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnRegisterLocalPlayerCompleteDelegate &Delegate) override
memberdef.name: RegisterLocalPlayer

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnUnregisterLocalPlayerCompleteDelegate &Delegate) override
memberdef.name: UnregisterLocalPlayer

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &TargetPlayerId) override
memberdef.name: RemovePlayerFromSession

detaileddescription.para: Query for any pending invites that the player passed in has yet to respond to.
Get every pending invite that has not yet been acted on
Get every pending game session invite that has not yet been acted on
Get every pending party invite that has not yet been acted on
Rejects any invite that was sent to the player passed in.

Query the backend for any session that the player is marked as active in. This is intended to be used to reconcile state between backend and client. Typically, this means that at login we want to grab all of the sessions where the player is marked as active to figure out if they are still considered to be in any sessions. From here, it is up to you if you want to rejoin the session through JoinSession, or leave the session entirely through the custom LeaveSession call.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user that we are restoring sessions for
Handler fired after the restore call either succeeds or fails

detaileddescription.para: Grab every restored session from our cache
Grab every restored party session from our cache
Grab every restored game session from our cache

Leave a restored session on the backend. For party sessions, this will allow you to create a new party instance once this call is finished. Though, this should also be done for game sessions that will not be rejoined.
Returns whether the local user is in a party session or not
Get the party session instance that the player is in, or nullptr if they are not in one
Register a dedicated server to Armada, either as a local server for testing, or as a managed Armada pod. This will also establish a connection with the DSHub service for session updates.

briefdescription.para: Notify the backend service that the server is already complete the prerequisite action(s) and ready to accept player. Either automatically called from RegisterServer if condition met (bRegisterServerOnAutoLogin is true) else call it manually after RegisterServer.

detaileddescription.para: Unregister a dedicated server from Armada
Get session type from session by its name
Get an AccelByte session type from a session settings object
Try and get the ID of the user that is leader of this particular session. Only works with party sessions.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const FName &SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerIdToKick, const FOnKickPlayerComplete &Delegate=FOnKickPlayerComplete())
memberdef.name: KickPlayer

detaileddescription.para: Kick a member of the session out of the session.
Promote a member of the game session to leader

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user that we are restoring sessions for
Name of the game session
ID of the player to be promoted as game session leader

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const FName &SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerIdToPromote, const FOnPromotePartySessionLeaderComplete &Delegate=FOnPromotePartySessionLeaderComplete())
memberdef.name: PromotePartySessionLeader

detaileddescription.para: Promote a member of the party session to leader

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user that we are restoring sessions for
Handler fired after the restore call either succeeds or fails

detaileddescription.para: Get the list of regions that you are able to spin up a server in, sorted by latency to the player.
Get the current session search handle that we are using for matchmaking.
Get the current amount of players in the session specified.
Get the current amount of players in the session specified.
Get the maximum amount of players allowed in the session specified.
Get the maximum amount of players allowed in the session specified.
Set the maximum amount of players allowed in the session specified. After calling this, UpdateSession must be called for this to take effect on backend.
Set the maximum amount of players allowed in the session specified. After calling this, UpdateSession must be called for this to take effect on backend.
Method to manually refresh a session's data from the backend. Use to reconcile state between client and backend if notifications are missed or other issues arise.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the session that we want to refresh data for
Delegate fired when we finish refreshing data for this session

simplesect.para: true if call was made to refresh session, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Create a backfill ticket for the session provided. This will queue your session to be backfilled with users from matchmaking.
Create a backfill ticket for the session provided. This will queue your session to be backfilled with users from matchmaking in the match pool specified.
Delete a backfill ticket associated with the session provided. This will stop backfilling players from matchmaking for the session.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FName &SessionName, const FAccelByteModelsV2MatchmakingBackfillProposalNotif &Proposal, bool bStopBackfilling, const FOnAcceptBackfillProposalComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: AcceptBackfillProposal

detaileddescription.para: Accept a backfill proposal from matchmaking. Which will then invite the players backfilled to your session.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FName &SessionName, const FAccelByteModelsV2MatchmakingBackfillProposalNotif &Proposal, bool bStopBackfilling, const FOnRejectBackfillProposalComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: RejectBackfillProposal

detaileddescription.para: Reject a backfill proposal from received from matchmaker. Players included in the proposal will not be added to the session.

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, const EAccelByteV2SessionMemberStatus &Status, const FOnSessionMemberStatusUpdateComplete &Delegate=FOnSessionMemberStatusUpdateComplete())
memberdef.name: UpdateMemberStatus

detaileddescription.para: Update the status of a member in a session. Intended to be used by the server to mark a player as connected or left.
Requires permission 'ADMIN:NAMESPACE:{namespace}:SESSION:GAME' to be set with action 'UPDATE'.

Join a session using a session code. This code is intended to be generated either by the leader or DSes, on session create, and passed to players to join the session without invites. To access an already generated code, grab the SETTING_PARTYSESSION_CODE setting out of a party session's settings.
Generate a new party code for this party session. Once updated, this new generated code will be reflected in the SETTING_PARTYSESSION_CODE session setting.
Revoke the code stored on a party for external joins. Once revoked, the SETTING_PARTYSESSION_CODE session setting will be blanked out and joining this party via code will not be possible.
Generate a new Game code for this game session. Once updated, this new generated code will be reflected in the SETTING_PARTYSESSION_CODE session setting.
Revoke the code stored on a game for external joins. Once revoked, the SETTING_PARTYSESSION_CODE session setting will be blanked out and joining this party via code will not be possible.
Set an override for a local server name to register with. Only intended for use with local dedicated servers.
Set an override for a local server IP to register with. Only intended for use with local dedicated servers.
Set an override for a local server name to register with. Only intended for use with local dedicated servers.
Get attributes for the given player. To update the stored values in the session backend service, call UpdatePlayerAttributes.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the local player that attributes should be returned for

detaileddescription.para: Sends a request to the session service to update a player's attributes.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the local player that attributes should be updated for
Structure describing what attributes should be updated for this player
Delegate to fire after task to update attributes completes

detaileddescription.para: Check if the player is the host of the P2P matchmaking match
Attempt to find a specific player's member settings entry within a FOnlineSessionSettings instance.

parameterdescription.para: Settings instance that we are attempting to find within
ID of the player that you are attempting to find a settings entry for
Settings for the player that were found

simplesect.para: bool true if found, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Attempt to find a specific player's member settings entry within a FOnlineSessionSettings instance.

parameterdescription.para: Settings instance that we are attempting to find within
ID of the player that you are attempting to find a settings entry for
Settings for the player that were found

simplesect.para: bool true if found, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Update session leader storage, only session leader that can use this. This will overwrite the current session storage if successful. Listen to UpdateSessionLeaderStorageComplete event for detailed information if the storage successfully updated in backend.

parameterdescription.para: UniqueNetId of user who will perform session leader storage update.
The name of the session NAME_GameSession or NAME_PartySession.
The JSON data for updating the leader storage.

simplesect.para: true if it successfully dispatch task to update the leader session storage.

detaileddescription.para: Update session member storage. This will overwrite the current session storage if successful. Listen to OnUpdateSessionMemberStorageComplete event for detailed information if the storage successfully updated in backend.

parameterdescription.para: UniqueNetId of user who will perform session leader storage update.
The name of the session NAME_GameSession or NAME_PartySession.
The JSON data for updating the member session storage.

simplesect.para: true if it successfully dispatch task to update the member session storage.

detaileddescription.para: Query the backend for active matchmaking tickets, Listen to OnGetMyActiveMatchTicketComplete for the result. if active ticket is found, it will fill CurrentMatchmakingSearchHandle so ticket can be cancelled with CancelMatchmaking call.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the player that you are attempting to find active match ticket for
Session name we are searching active match ticket for
Match pool we are going to search active ticket for

simplesect.para: true if query request is sent, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Check if a userId is a member in a named session

parameterdescription.para: ID of the player that you are attempting to search in a session
Session name we are searching the user in

simplesect.para: true if UserId is part of session member, false otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we have retrieved information on the session that our server is claimed by on the backend.

parameterdescription.para: the name that our server session is stored under

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we have finished restoring all invites from the backend to the local interface.

parameterdescription.para: whether the call to get all invites was a success
ID of the player who had their invites restored

memberdef.argsstring: (OnV2SessionInviteReceived, const FUniqueNetId &, const FUniqueNetId &, const FOnlineSessionInviteAccelByte &)
memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_DELEGATE_THREE_PARAM

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we get a session invite from another player. Includes an AccelByte invite structure to allow for rejecting the invite.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the local user that received the invite
ID of the remote user that sent the invite
Invite structure that can be used to either accept or reject the invite

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when our local list of invites has been updated
Delegate fired when the server info for the session referenced changes. Basically is a signal that the server is ready to be traveled to.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the session that has had server information change.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when session failed to get a server.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the session.
Message of the error

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when matchmaking has started
Delegate fired when matchmaking ticket has expired.
Delegate fired when matchmaking ticket has been canceled.
Delegate fired when the game server receives a backfill proposal from matchmaking. Use AcceptBackfillProposal and RejectBackfillProposal to act on the proposal.
Delegate fired when a session's invited members list changes.
Delegate fired when a local player has been kicked from a session. Fired before session is destroyed in case there is a need to do any extra clean up.
Delegate fired when a local player has received an update from the backend to a session

Delegate fired when a session update request is completed. Together with the above OnSessionUpdateReceived delegate, the developer can separately listen to both update notifications and update request completion, without breaking changes to the regular OnUpdateSessionComplete delegate, which is used to handle both cases
Delegate fired when a session update fails due to a version mismatch

memberdef.argsstring: (OnSendSessionInviteComplete, const FUniqueNetId &, FName, bool, const FUniqueNetId &)
memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_DELEGATE_FOUR_PARAM

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when a local player has sent an invite to a player
Delegate fired when a local player rejects invite
Delegate fired when a player's attributes have been initialized. Should be fired once toward the end of login.

Delegate fired when server query party sessions complete Delegate fired when get my active match ticket complete, SearchHandle will be invalid if no active ticket is found. Delegate broadcast when a session that the player is in locally has been removed on the backend. Gives the game an opportunity to clean up state.
Delegate broadcast when another game session member promoted to be a game session leader. Delegate fired when session leader storage has received an update
Delegate fired when a session member's storage has received an update
Delegate fired when session leader storage has received an update
Delegate fired when a session member's storage has received an update
Delegate fired when send server ready completed.
Initializer method for this interface. Used to define internal delegate handlers that don't require user identifiers.
Session tick for various background tasks
Register notification delegates for the player specified. Will also fire off associated OSS delegates once received.
Get an AccelByte joinability enum from a string value
Get an AccelByte session type from a string value
Figure out the AccelByte joinability status of a session from its settings
Get a string representation of the joinability enum passed in
Get an AccelByte joinability enum from a string value
Get an AccelByte joinability enum from a string value
Create a new named game session instance based on the passed in settings and backend session structure
Create a new named party session instance based on the passed in settings and backend session structure
Construct a new session search result instance from a backend representation of a game session
Construct a new session search result instance from a backend representation of a party session
Fill out SessionSettings field of a game session with constants from the backend data
Fill out SessionSettings field of a party session with constants from the backend data
Checks whether or not the attribute name passed in is intended to be ignored for session attributes on backend.
Attempt to get the currently bound local address for a dedicated server.
Attempt to get the currently bound port for a dedicated server.
Attempt to get the name of the local server to register with
Attempt to get the session that is currently associated with this dedicated server. Will create a new game session under NAME_GameSession for the developer to interface with.
Remove a restored session instance by it's ID, if an instance exists

parameterdescription.para: Session ID that we are trying to find and remove a restore session instance for

simplesect.para: bool true if found and removed, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Remove an invite from our local list by it's ID. Used when we accept or reject an invite.

parameterdescription.para: Session ID that we are trying to find and remove an invite instance for

simplesect.para: bool true if found and removed, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const EAccelByteV2SessionType &SessionType, const FString &SessionId, const FOnLeaveSessionComplete &Delegate=FOnLeaveSessionComplete())
memberdef.name: LeaveSession

detaileddescription.para: Send a request on the backend to leave a session by its ID. Used internally by LeaveRestoredSession and DestroySession to notify backend that we want to leave the session referenced.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user that is leaving the session provided
ID of the session that we want to leave
Delegate fired once the leave session call completes

simplesect.para: bool true if leave session task was spawned, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convert an array of doubles to an array of FJsonValues

parameterdescription.para: The source array to convert

simplesect.para: An array of shared pointers to FJsonValues

detaileddescription.para: Convert an array of FStrings to an array of FJsonValues

parameterdescription.para: The source array to convert

simplesect.para: An array of shared pointers to FJsonValues

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedPtr< FJsonValue > > *JsonArray, TArray< FString > &OutArray) const
memberdef.name: ConvertSessionSettingJsonToArray

detaileddescription.para: Convert a JSON array into a primitive array of FStrings

parameterdescription.para: The array to convert, pulled out of a JSON object
The array of strings to write to

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the conversion was successful

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedPtr< FJsonValue > > *JsonArray, TArray< double > &OutArray) const
memberdef.name: ConvertSessionSettingJsonToArray

detaileddescription.para: Convert a JSON array into a primitive array of doubles

parameterdescription.para: The array to convert, pulled out of a JSON object
The array of doubles to write to

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the conversion was successful

detaileddescription.para: Convert a session settings object into a JSON object that can be used with create or update requests for sessions.
Read a base session model into a session settings instance
Read a JSON object into a session member settings instance
Convert a session search parameters into a json object that can be used to fill match ticket attributes
Attempt to connect to a P2P session

memberdef.argsstring: (const FName &SessionName, const FAccelByteModelsV2GameSession &UpdatedGameSession, bool &bIsConnectingToP2P, bool bIsFirstJoin=false)
memberdef.name: UpdateInternalGameSession

detaileddescription.para: Update game session data from a backend model. Used for update notifications and refreshing a game session manually.
Update party session data from a backend model. Used for update notifications and refreshing a game session manually.
Connect a server to the DS hub, as well as register delegates internally for session management.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the server that is connecting to the DS hub

detaileddescription.para: Disconnect a server from the DS hub, unregistering any delegates bound.
Send ready message to AMS
Disconnect a server from the AMS, unregistering any delegates bound.
Initialize Metric Exporter.

parameterdescription.para: StatsD IPv4 address
StatsD port
Interval of exporting metric to StatsD

detaileddescription.para: Set Label to a specific Key of metric

parameterdescription.para: Key to add label
label name for the key

detaileddescription.para: Enqueue Metric

parameterdescription.para: The key of the metric
Floating number value of the metric

detaileddescription.para: Enqueue Metric

parameterdescription.para: The key of the metric
Integer value of the metric

detaileddescription.para: Enqueue Metric

parameterdescription.para: The key of the metric
String value of the metric

detaileddescription.para: Set Sending optional metrics or not
Set the StatsD Metric Collector. By default it will use AccelByteStatsDMetricCollector class. Should be set if custom collector is needed.

parameterdescription.para: The collector object inherited from IAccelByteStatsDMetricCollector

detaileddescription.para: Makes a call to grab the most recent stored player attributes from the session service, and updates them with the current platform. Intended to be called at the end of the login process.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the player that we want to initialize attributes for

detaileddescription.para: Get the internal model for a player's attributes.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the player that we want to get the internal attributes model for

detaileddescription.para: Stores attributes for a player in this interface. Intended to be used at login.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the player that we wish to store attributes for
Attributes that we wish to store locally for this player, will be moved directly into map

briefdescription.para: Query game sessions from a server, listen for OnServerQueryGameSessionsComplete delegate for the result.

parameterdescription.para: Request for the query for filtering the result
Offset of the query
Maximum number of game sessions listed

simplesect.para: true if request successfully sent

briefdescription.para: Query party sessions from a server, listen for OnServerQueryPartySessionsComplete delegate for the result.

parameterdescription.para: Request for the query for filtering the result
Offset of the query
Maximum number of game sessions listed

simplesect.para: true if request successfully sent

detaileddescription.para: Add a canceled ticket ID to this interface instance for tracking

briefdescription.para: Get whether Server is using AMS or not.

simplesect.para: true if Server is using AMS

briefdescription.para: Used for sending dedicated server ready to session service. This method used by the DS if dsManualSetReady flag enabled in session template to indicate that this DS ready to receive connection.

simplesect.para: true if request sent to the session service

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Trigger warning to notify that the DS is not flag itself as ready after several minutes.
Reset the bound delegate and timer.
Hidden on purpose

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &HostingPlayerId, const FName &SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings, bool bSendCreateRequest=true)
memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, bool bWasSuccessful, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &Result, FAccelByteModelsV2PartyInvitedEvent InviteEvent)
memberdef.name: OnFindPartySessionForInviteComplete

memberdef.argsstring: (FNamedOnlineSession *Session, const TArray< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionUser > &PreviousMembers, const bool bHasInvitedPlayersChanged)
memberdef.name: UpdateSessionMembers

detaileddescription.para: Sets up socket subsystem for a P2P connection and runs set up on the subsystem level
Tears down the socket subsystem for a P2P connection, called on destroy session

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &PeerId, const AccelByte::NetworkUtilities::EAccelByteP2PConnectionStatus &Status, FName SessionName, EOnlineSessionP2PConnectedAction Action)
memberdef.name: OnICEConnectionComplete

detaileddescription.para: Delegate handler when we finish connecting to a P2P ICE session
Internal method to get a named session as a const pointer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FName &SessionName, const TSharedPtr< FAccelByteModelsV2BaseSession > &SessionData, const bool bIsDSReadyUpdate=false)
memberdef.name: EnqueueBackendDataUpdate

detaileddescription.para: Enqueue a session data update for the next tick if its version is more up-to-date than existing data

briefdescription.para: Handler for auto join game session from backend.

parameterdescription.para: game session information from the backend.
Local user num.

simplesect.para: true if successfully synced auto join game session from backend.
